title: Administration
description: The Administration section provides system administrators with tools to manage users, roles, permissions, authentication providers, system configuration, and platform health. Use these controls to maintain security, configure integrations, and monitor the operational state of the Parthenon platform.
tips: Assign roles at the group level rather than per user to simplify permission management as your organization grows.
Review the Audit Log regularly to track data access and configuration changes for compliance purposes.
Configure authentication providers before onboarding users to ensure seamless single sign-on from day one.
Use the System Health dashboard to proactively identify performance bottlenecks before they affect researchers.
Restrict AI provider credentials to administrators to prevent unauthorized usage of external AI services.
